name: 06-15-home-zoom-layout-fix
title: Fix home reference layout when viewport zoom or width changes
description: Prevent the FableMap home/discover reference artboard from breaking when the browser is slightly zoomed or the desktop viewport is narrower than the fixed 1536px design.
creator: codex
notes: Fixed shared FableMap artboard rendering by scaling the desktop 1536x1024 canvas as a single unit inside the available viewport width and height. Follow-up corrected large-screen behavior by avoiding width-only scaling and removing desktop min-height leakage. Verified main routes at desktop zoom, laptop, and mobile widths; frontend build passed.
